prestazioni: Engine swap to a **M30B35** (3.5L inline-6 from the E28 535i) with a custom **Schrick 284° camshaft** and **Mahle Motorsport forged pistons** (10.5:1 compression), paired with a **Bosch Motronic MS2.8 standalone ECU** for precise fuel and ignition mapping. The stock M30 exhaust manifold is replaced with a **Supersprint 4-2-1 header** and a **Remus Sport exhaust** with 60mm tips for optimized scavenging.

Suspension overhaul using **Bilstein B16 PSS10 coilovers** (adjustable damping and ride height) with **Eibach Pro-Kit springs** (-30mm drop) and **Meyle HD control arms** to correct geometry. Rear subframe reinforced with **012 Motorsport polyurethane bushings** and a **Whiteline rear sway bar (22mm)** to reduce body roll.

Braking system upgraded to **AP Racing CP6640 front calipers** (4-piston) with **330mm slotted rotors** and **Ferodo DS2500 pads**, paired with a **Wilwood master cylinder** and **Goodridge braided stainless steel brake lines**. Rear brakes retain the stock setup but are fitted with **ATE Type 200 rotors** and **Textar 1310 pads** for balanced stopping power.
estetica: Full **Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit** (E9 coupe conversion) with **custom carbon fiber fender flares** (hand-laid by **Seibon Carbon**) and **custom aluminum inner fenders** to accommodate the wider track. Front bumper replaced with a **custom 3D-printed ABS unit** featuring integrated **Hella Rallye 1000 lights** and a **carbon fiber splitter** from **Vorshlag Motorsport**.

Interior stripped and rebuilt with **Recaro SRD Evo II seats** (H-pattern harness slots) wrapped in **Nappa leather with Alcantara inserts** (custom-stitched by **Status Racing**). Dashboard and door cards retrimmed in **diamond-stitched black leather** with **Momo Prototipo steering wheel** (380mm, suede) and **NRG quick-release hub**. Roll cage is a **custom 8-point bolt-in** by **Autopower Industries** (mild steel, powder-coated satin black).

Exterior color: **BMW Classic Schwarz II (040) with a 3-stage hand-polished finish** (applied by **Mirror Finish Detail**). Wheels are **BBS RS-GT II (16x9 ET15 front, 16x10 ET5 rear)** with **Nankang AR-1 semi-slick tires (225/50/16 front, 245/45/16 rear)**. Additional details include **custom laser-cut aluminum side skirts** (matching the Rocket Bunny kit) and a **carbon fiber rear diffuser** with **dual 80mm exhaust outlets** (integrated into the diffuser).
